what_changed: Hardened routed storage batch payload validation for custom range readers.
pr-evidence/harden-routed-reader-batch-p.why: Dynamic KV loading from Memory, Disk, and Unity Catalog reader integrations should fail clearly when a custom batch reader returns a single bytes object, the wrong number of payloads, or non-bytes payload entries.
